# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an Azure ARM template for a Storage Account to hold application data and user uploads. Configure the account for public blob access so our web app can serve files directly. Set AccessTier to Hot for performance. This is for our MVP deployment that needs quick access to stored files.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  resources:
    - apiVersion: '2018-05-01'
      kind: 'StorageAccounts'
      name: '<your_storage_account_name>'
      type: 'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts'
      location: 'eastus'
      properties:
        sku:
          name: Standard_LRS
        kind: StorageV2
        accessTier: Hot
        creationTimestamp: <timestamp>
        networkAcls: {}
      resources:
        - name: firewall rules
          type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
          properties:
            roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/8e3af6a8-a3aa-4ab0-b7b2-911bf3658fd6'
            principalId: '<systemAssignedIdentityId>'
            resources: ['/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/{your_storage_account_name}']
        - name: public-access
          type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
          properties:
            roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/defaultRoles/storageblobdatacontributor'
            resources: ['/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/{your_storage_account_name}']

parameters:
  subscriptionId:
    type: string
    defaultValue: '<subscriptionId>'
  resourceGroup:
    type: string
    defaultValue: '<resourceGroup>'
